reflections.context: Address wording regression/UX confusion for project switching action.
reflections.outcome: Updated the label text to 'Switch Project' and verified with App test + typecheck.
reflections.effectiveness: High for UX clarity with minimal risk.
reflections.lesson: Small label changes should still get verification to avoid accidental template regressions.
reflections.pattern: Low-effort UI copy fixes can unblock user flow quickly when triaged from open aims.

status.comment: Renamed App header action label from 'Close Project' to 'Switch Project' in App.vue. Verified App unit test and frontend typecheck pass.
